title: m011 credit batch quality score
description: Schema for an M011 credit batch quality score output.

score.description: 7-factor weighted composite quality score for a credit batch.

confidence.description: Data availability indicator (count of available signals / 7 × 1000).

project_reputation.description: M010 reputation score for the project.

class_reputation.description: M010 reputation score for the credit class.

vintage_freshness.description: Linear decay from issuance (1000) to 10 years (0).

verification_recency.description: Linear decay from last verification (1000) to 3 years (0).

seller_reputation.description: M010 reputation score for the seller address.

price_fairness.description: 1000 at class median price, 0 at ±50% deviation.

additionality_confidence.description: Methodology additionality assessment from credit class metadata.
